transcript: Speaker A: Mr. Shrishanth, straight-a sollanum, mudhalla neenga dhaan English kathukkanum. Appo dhaan paiyan English medium-la nalla perform panna mudiyum. Veetla neenga Tamil pesina, avan eppadi English kathuppan? [Mr. Shrishanth, frankly speaking, you need to learn English first. Only then can your son perform well in an English medium school. If you speak Tamil at home, how will he learn English?] Speaker B: Madam, enakke English pesa theriyadhu. Appo naan eppadi avanukku kathu kuduppen? [Madam, I don't know how to speak English myself. So how can I teach him?] Speaker A: Ippo laam English kathukuradhu rombave easy. Adhanaala dhaan naan unga maari parents-ku SpeakX app-a suggest panren. [Learning English is very easy now. That's why I suggest the SpeakX app to parents like you.] Speaker B: SpeakX app-aa? [SpeakX app?] Speaker A: Idhula AI teacher irukkaanga. Avanga ungalukku English pesa kathu kuduppanga. Veetula free-a irukkumbodhu, illa office-la irukkumbodhu oru 15 minutes practice pannunga. Podhum. Neenga yedhaavadhu thappa pesuna udane correct panniduvaanga. Ennoda student-oda amma kooda 15 days back dhaan practice start pannaanga. Ippo avanga pasangalukku English kathu kudukkuraanga, enkitta kooda confident-a English pesuraanga. [It has an AI teacher who will teach you English. Just practice for 15 minutes when free at home or office. If you make mistakes, they correct you instantly. Another student's mother started 15 days ago and now teaches her kids and speaks confidently with me.] Speaker B: Correct madam, naan English kathukitta dhaan en magan Rohan-um nallaa English pesuvaan. [Correct madam, only if I learn English will my son Rohan speak well too.] Speaker A: Kandippa 15 days kudunga. Unga English fluent aydum. [Definitely give it 15 days. Your English will become fluent.] Speaker B: Indha AI teacher-ku evvalavu selavu? [How much does this AI teacher cost?] Speaker A: Just 2 rupees-ku 7 days trial irukku. Innikke download pannunga. [There is a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees. Download today.]

summary: A teacher advises a parent that he must learn English first so his son can succeed in an English-medium school. She recommends the SpeakX app, highlighting its AI teacher that provides instant corrections and flexible 15-minute daily practice. The ad concludes with a call to action to start a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees.
